name: dinner_party_09
description: Casual dinner party at friend's home

input.subject: Dinner at our place next Saturday?
input.snippet: Hey! We'd love to have you over for dinner...
input.body_text:
Hey!

We'd love to have you over for dinner next Saturday, February 7th. Maria's making her famous lasagna!

Come by around 6:30pm. We're at:
321 Elm Street
Portland, OR 97201

Bring your appetite (and maybe a bottle of wine if you're feeling generous 🍷)

Let me know if you can make it!

Tom

events.title: Dinner at Tom & Maria's
events.description: Dinner party at Tom and Maria's

notes: Informal dinner invitation with 'next Saturday' relative date reference
